hero.title: Build Habits Together.
hero.description: The habit tracker where friends help you show up. Get cheered on when you complete. Get gentle encouragement when you're behind. No strangers. No judgment. Just your people.

howItWorks.title: How
howItWorks.description: Start building habits with friends in three simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Description: Set up your daily habit - whether it's working out, reading, meditating, or anything else you want to build.
howItWorks.step2Description: Add friends who share your goals. They'll see your progress and you'll see theirs. Accountability starts here.
howItWorks.step3Description: Complete daily, build streaks, and cheer each other on. When everyone shows up, everyone wins.

features.title: Features designed for
features.description: Everything you need to build lasting habits with people who care.
features.feature1Description: When a friend is struggling, send a cheer. But here's the catch: you can only encourage after you've completed yourself. No guilt-tripping—just genuine support.
features.feature2Description: Build consistency as a team. Your group streak grows when everyone shows up. It's not just about you anymore—your friends are counting on you.
features.feature3Description: Chat with your group right inside each habit. Share tips, celebrate milestones, and keep each other motivated without leaving the app.

screenshots.title: See
screenshots.description: A beautiful, intuitive experience designed to help you succeed.

trust.title: Your Habits, Your Rules
trust.description: Gimu is built on trust. You control exactly what you share and with whom.
trust.privateDescription: Your habits stay private until you choose to share them.
trust.friendsDescription: No strangers, no public feeds. Just people you actually know.
trust.supportDescription: Friends encourage, they don't criticize. That's how Gimu works.

story.title: Why We Built Gimu
story.descriptionPart1: Every habit app felt the same—download it, use it for a week, forget it exists. We realized the missing piece wasn't better reminders or fancier charts. It was
story.descriptionPart2: . When you have real friends counting on you, showing up becomes easier. That's why we built Gimu—so everyone can have that support system.

download.title: Ready to Build Habits With Friends?
download.description: Start your journey today. Your future self will thank you.

legal.privacyDescription: Learn how Gimu collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
legal.termsDescription: Read the terms and conditions for using the Gimu app.

support.title: Support
support.description: Have a question or running into an issue? We're here to help.
support.contactDescription: For any questions, bug reports, or feedback, send us an email and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.
support.faq1Question: How do I create an account?
support.faq1Answer: Download Gimu from the App Store or Google Play, tap Sign Up, and create your account with an email address. You'll choose a display name and a unique username that friends can use to find you.
support.faq2Question: How do I share a habit with a friend?
support.faq2Answer: Open any habit and tap the invite button. Search for your friend by their username, then send an invitation. They'll need to accept before they're added to the habit. Both of you can then see each other's progress.
support.faq3Question: Can I keep some habits private?
support.faq3Answer: Yes. Every habit has a privacy toggle. Private habits won't appear in your friends' activity feed and only you can see them. You control exactly what you share.
support.faq4Answer: Your streak counts consecutive completions based on your habit's schedule — daily, specific days, or weekly goals. For shared habits, the streak is a group effort: everyone in the habit needs to complete it for the streak to continue. Hit 3 in a row and your streak catches fire!
support.faq5Question: How do I delete my account?
support.faq5Answer: You can request account deletion by emailing support@gimu.app. We'll delete all your personal data within 30 days of your request, as described in our Privacy Policy.
support.faq6Question: Is Gimu available in my language?
support.faq6Answer: Gimu is available in English, German, Spanish, French, Italian, Japanese, Korean, and Portuguese. The app will automatically use your device's language if it's one of these.
